rationale: Educ. Code §29.1532 governs prekindergarten program requirements (class size, licensing, PEIMS reporting). It contains no provision tied to the homestead exemption amount or property tax appraised value, so increasing the §11.13(b) exemption creates no direct conflict.
quote: A school district's prekindergarten program shall be designed to develop skills necessary for success in the regular public school curriculum, including language, mathematics, and social skills.
_note: No direct or indirect reference to homestead exemption amounts, property tax values, or school funding formulas appears in this statute.
